data.title: 'Bluey's Best Day Ever!' Debuts March 22, 2026, at Disneyland Resort
data.description: Bluey and Bingo make their debut at a Disney park, featuring a family-friendly event celebrating the animated series 'Bluey.' The event, titled 'Bluey's Best Day Ever,' showcases live music, dancing, themed treats, and other activities at Disneyland Park. Limited-time ticket and hotel offers are available for families looking to enjoy the festivities.

data.title: At AAAAI 2026, Board-Certified Allergist Highlights SkinSight AI™* by ModuleMD: Advancing Precision in Allergy Skin Test Interpretation
data.description: In Philadelphia on March 20, 2026, it was highlighted at the 2026 American Academy of Allergy Asthma & Immunology (AAAAI) Annual Meeting that artificial intelligence is significantly influencing the future of allergy diagnostics. This was emphasized during a session at the event, showcasing the increasing role of AI in this field.

data.title: NRMP Releases Results of the 2026 Main Residency Match for More Than 38,000 Future Residents
data.description: On March 20, 2026, the National Resident Matching Program (NRMP) revealed the outcomes of the 2026 Main Residency Match, its largest ever conducted. This year, the program saw participation from over 53,000 applicants and offered more than 44,000 residency positions.

data.title: Centerline Partners with NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens to Bring Elite Competition to the Pickleball Court
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in San Diego, the premium performance apparel brand Centerline Athletics announced their partnership with NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens, who will be joining the brand as its latest Brand Ambassador. Owens, known for his competitive spirit, will bring his expertise to the brand aimed at modern pickleball athletes.

data.title: AUDIO ONE UNVEILS GLOBAL MEDIA POWERHOUSE; SECURES LANDMARK DISTRIBUTION DEAL
data.description: A studio headquartered in Beverly Hills has been established, featuring a multi-city infrastructure in Nashville, Las Vegas, Birmingham, and Atlanta. The studio's lineup is spearheaded by "The Jay Walker Podcast." This development was announced in Beverly Hills, California, on March 20, 2026, through PRNewswire. Audio One, the prominent media and production company behind this venture, is dedicated to excellence in the industry.

data.title: AAVE forecast: Aiming for $125-$135 by April 2026 despite current downtrend, supported by $105.80. Technical analysis indicates positive trajectory.
data.description: According to AAVE price forecasts, there is a possibility of a rebound to between $125 and $135 by April 2026, even amidst the current decline in market sentiment. Analysis of technical indicators indicates crucial support at $105.80, with potential upward targets becoming apparent.

data.title: With more than 350 services companies established, Costa Rica targets new global operations at SSOW 2026
data.description: During the Shared Services & Outsourcing Week 2026 in Orlando, Florida, PROCOMER highlighted the country's value proposition to industry executives worldwide. The event featured meetings with companies considering expanding or relocating corporate service operations. This initiative aimed to promote business opportunities and establish partnerships, potentially leading to economic growth.

data.title: Results from Real-World, Long-Term Treatment Persistence with LEQEMBI® (lecanemab-irmb) in the United States Presented at AD/PD™ 2026
data.description: New data from real-world settings indicates that patients are opting to continue long-term treatment with LEQEMBI. The study revealed that a significant number of patients, approximately 70%, are choosing to stay on LEQEMBI for extended periods. This data offers valuable insights into patient preferences and could impact treatment decisions moving forward. The findings underscore the importance of providing effective and well-tolerated treatment options for patients requiring long-term care.

data.title: Chamonix Partners Launches Inaugural Project Finance CLO at $306.8 Million, Driving Global Market Infrastructure Investment
data.description: Chamonix Partners Capital Management unveiled the finalization of its first project finance Collateralized Loan Obligation named Chamonix Infrastructure Funding I, LLC (CPIF 2026-1A). The CLO, backed by $304 million, marks a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: Tech workers are maxing out A.I. use at companies, competing to show their usage. Resulting in large bills.
data.description: At several companies, employees engage in a competition using leaderboards to showcase their utilization of artificial intelligence (A.I.). This practice has led to substantial expenses being incurred by participants in the competition.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Koskinen
data.description: In Helsinki, Finland on March 20, 2026, a press release from Nordea Bank Abp announces that one of its Group Leadership Team members, Jussi Koskinen, has recently acquired a total of 22,613 shares in the company. This transaction was disclosed at 16:00 EET on the same day as part of the Managers' transactions protocol.
Leading Edge Materials reveals Q1 2026 financial figures.

data.title: Signing of Primary Dealer Agreements
data.description: Today, the Government Debt Management, acting on behalf of the Treasury, finalized agreements with primary dealers related to the issuance and market making of Treasury securities. The primary goal of these agreements is to ensure the Treasury's continual access to funding and improve price discovery in the secondary market for Treasury securities. Additionally, the agreements aim to support the creation of a robust system for benchmark issues in Iceland.

data.title: Alamos Gold Files Technical Report for the Island Gold District Expansion
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Alamos Gold Inc. disclosed that they submitted a technical report for the Expansion Study conducted at the Island Gold District operation in Ontario, Canada. The company trades under the symbols TSX:AGI and NYSE:AGI. This news signifies a significant step in the development of the operation located in Ontario, indicating potential growth and advancements in the mining sector in the region.

data.title: LDO price to hit $0.33 by April 2026. Currently at $0.30 with conflicting signals: potential rise to $0.33, but downside risk to $0.28.
data.description: The digital currency LDO is currently trading at $0.30, showing mixed signals in the market. According to technical analysis, there is a prospect of a breakout towards the $0.33 resistance level. However, the bearish MACD indicator is indicating a downside risk, potentially leading to a drop to the $0.28 support levels.
